name: Comfort Cake
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------GLAZE-----------------------------------
1/2 cup Butter/margarine
1/2 cup Granulated sugar
1/8 cup Water
1/4 cup Southern Comfort
To make glaze, melt butter in a saucepan. Stir in water and sugar. Boil for 3 minutes, stirring constantly, then remove from heat and stir in Southern Comfort.
Combine cake ingredients in a large bowl and beat at medium speed for 2 minutes. Pour into a greased and floured 10-inch tube or 12-cup bundt pan. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour. Set on rack to cool. Invert onto serving plate. Prick the top immediately; drizzle and brush half of glaze evenly over top and sides. Reserve remaining glaze and brush it evenly over cake. Just before serving, sift 1 tablespoon powdered sugar over cake.
